title: gentiana angulosa var. pontica
intro: Gentiana angulosa var. pontica is a type of plant that belongs to the Gentianaceae family, commonly known as the gentian or gentianwort. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Gentiana angulosa var. pontica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
